task_completion.description: Verify that at least three folders prefixed with 'UA-' have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the folder pane/sidebar of the email client. There should be at least three distinct folders whose names start with 'UA-' (e.g., UA-Mozilla, UA-Outlook, UA-Mutt).

task_completion.description: Verify that the first 'UA-' folder contains at least three emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the first 'UA-' folder is selected. The message list pane must show at least 3 emails inside this folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second 'UA-' folder contains at least three emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the second 'UA-' folder is selected. The message list pane must show at least 3 emails inside this folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the third 'UA-' folder contains at least three emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the third 'UA-' folder is selected. The message list pane must show at least 3 emails inside this folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft email has the correct recipient and subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an email composer or draft window. The 'To' field must contain exactly 'product-team@company.com' and the 'Subject' field must be exactly 'Client Demographics Report'.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft email body summarizes the findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the body of the draft email. It must contain text summarizing the findings and explicitly mention the names of the identified email clients (e.g., Mozilla, Outlook, Mutt).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical email client to manage folders and emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a GUI email client (like Thunderbird or Evolution) to create folders and move emails, rather than terminal windows using commands like 'mkdir' or 'mv'.

integrity.description: Verify the draft email was composed in the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft email must be visible in the email client's actual message composer window, not typed into a generic text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used genuine email client names from the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'UA-' folders and the draft report should reference real email clients found in the dataset (e.g., Mozilla, Outlook, Microsoft, Mutt, Pegasus, Apple Mail), not generic placeholders like 'UA-Client1'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create at least 3 folders prefixed with 'UA-' (e.g., UA-Mozilla, UA-Outlook, UA-Mutt). Valid clients in the dataset with at least 3 emails include Mozilla, Outlook/Microsoft, Mutt, Pegasus, and Apple Mail. Each folder must contain at least 3 emails. The draft report must be addressed to 'product-team@company.com' with the subject 'Client Demographics Report' and reference the identified client names.
